title: Child Protective Services Caseworker
description: Investigate reports of child abuse and neglect, conduct safety assessments, and coordinate services for Baltimore City families.

title: PRIDE Foster Parent Trainer (Contract)
description: Facilitate pre-service PRIDE training cohorts for prospective foster and kinship parents. Evening and weekend availability required.

title: MSW Field Instructor
description: Supervise MSW students in field placement and provide clinical instruction in child and family practice settings.
